title: Run live Validator-B Gemini smoke
objective: Verify the installed Gemini CLI works with scripts/run-validator-b.mjs and capture the live stdout envelope behavior.
scope: Create a minimal Validator-B live smoke handoff.
Run scripts/run-validator-b.mjs with the installed Gemini CLI.
Capture whether live output parses into validator-result.schema.json.
If the stdout envelope, prompt transport, or read-only mode differs from current assumptions, patch the wrapper and rerun.
Record report, quality score, and Validator-A validation before merge.
success_criteria: gemini CLI is detected and version is recorded.
run-validator-b live execution is attempted with a fresh Validator-B handoff.
Validator-B result artifact is produced and parses as Validator-B / Gemini CLI result, or a Resource Failure is recorded with clear cause.
If parser changes are required, node --check and audit:harness pass.
Validator-A validation passes before main merge.
constraints: Do not record API keys, tokens, credentials, PII, or environment variable values.
Do not include Validator-A results in Validator-B handoff.
Treat Gemini auth/quota/rate/context failures as Resource Failure, not Validator-B FAIL.
Do not browse or fetch external content for this smoke.
